clusters.title: Ambulances diverted, 11 people unwell after hazmat leak at Adelaide hospital
clusters.neutral_headline: Ambulances diverted, 11 people unwell after hazmat leak at Adelaide hospital
bullet_summary: Reported by The Age, ABC News Australia

items.title: Ambulances diverted, 11 people unwell after hazmat leak at Adelaide hospital
items.standfirst: A hazmat incident has forced Flinders Medical Centre to divert ambulances after toxic insect repellent fumes were accidentally released in the emergency department.
items.content: A hazmat incident has forced Flinders Medical Centre to divert ambulances after toxic insect repellent fumes were accidentally released in the emergency department.

items.title: Insect repellent release leaves 11 staff sick at major SA hospital
items.standfirst: Eleven staff at an Adelaide hospital have become unwell and a dozen emergency beds have been closed, after the accidental release of an "outdoor insect repellent" inside the facility.
items.content: Eleven staff at an Adelaide hospital have become unwell and a dozen emergency beds have been closed, after the accidental release of an "outdoor insect repellent" inside the facility.
